summary: Front-End Developer with 5+ years of experience building modern, responsive, and high-performance interfaces using React, TypeScript, and JavaScript. Experienced working with design systems, reusable component libraries, and REST API integrations. Comfortable collaborating closely with backend, UX/UI, and product teams in agile environments. Focused on code quality, componentization best practices, and delivering real user value. Active participant in code reviews and technical discussions.

bullets: Explored AI-assisted development workflows and applied them to improve productivity and code quality.
Deepened understanding of front-end architecture, component design patterns, and performance optimization.
Experimented with event-driven architecture and message queuing using RabbitMQ in personal projects, exploring producer/consumer patterns and async service communication.
Studied modern tooling and ecosystem practices including TDD and spec-driven development workflows.
Worked on personal projects to strengthen real-world problem-solving and UI engineering skills.
Built reusable and accessible UI components using CVA and Radix UI, maintaining a consistent design system across web products.
Developed responsive screens in Next.js (Web) and React Native (Mobile) based on product prototypes and UX specifications.
Collaborated with UX/UI designers and product owners to translate Figma designs into clean, maintainable React code.
Integrated front-end applications with backend REST APIs, ensuring reliable data flow and error handling.
Implemented unit, integration, and end-to-end tests using Jest, React Testing Library, and Cypress.
Participated in technical backlog refinement alongside product and backend teams.
Maintained and improved a TypeScript codebase with a focus on code quality, readability, and long-term maintainability.
Maintained and evolved front-end applications built with React, Redux, TypeScript, and Styled-Components, improving performance and maintainability.
Integrated front-end applications with third-party and internal REST APIs, including advanced request management strategies to prevent race conditions.
Designed and delivered real-time chat features using Socket.IO.
Implemented unit tests using Jest and React Testing Library, increasing code reliability and reducing regressions.
Enhanced the company's Design System by implementing Storybook Controls, improving component discoverability and adoption across squads.
Built websites and digital platforms using React, Next.js, Gatsby, TypeScript, and modern JavaScript (ES6+).
Participated in code reviews, disseminating best practices in component architecture, testing, and front-end quality.
Mentored new engineers on front-end practices, code quality, and design system usage.
Deployed and maintained React applications on AWS S3, contributing to CI/CD pipelines.
Integrated front-end applications with internal and third-party APIs, ensuring robust data flow and error handling.
Developed and maintained a production mobile application (iOS and Android) using React Native and Redux.
Redesigned application screens based on high-fidelity prototypes, applying UX, usability, and accessibility best practices.
Contributed to the successful MVP launch, collaborating cross-functionally to ensure timely production delivery.
Designed and developed user-friendly interfaces with a strong focus on UX, usability, and accessibility best practices using React and Styled-Components.
Developed responsive landing pages based on Figma prototypes, ensuring visual consistency and cross-device performance.
Integrated REST APIs to collect and process marketing campaign data for a SaaS dashboard platform.
Collaborated with the Product team to gather and refine requirements, translating business needs into technical specifications.
Designed and implemented user-friendly interfaces with a focus on usability and accessibility.
Developed a new event scheduling module using JavaScript, CSS3, and Laravel (PHP).
Modeled relational database schemas (1NF–3NF) for data integrity.

education.institution: Centro Universitário do Leste de Minas Gerais
bullets: Focusing on Computer Software Engineering
